payable_claim_ids.description: Approved batch claims that can remain in the AP reimbursement queue.

blocked_claim_ids.description: Batch claims that are not paid and should not be released to AP until the expense case or AP link is corrected.

paid_claim_ids.description: Batch claims with a matching paid AP bill and cleared payment for the claim amount.

ap_open_balance_total.description: Total amount of valid open AP reimbursement bills for payable batch claims only.

crm_required_claim_ids.description: Blocked batch claims requiring expense-case owner cleanup or AP-link remediation.

batch_status.description: Overall batch close status. Use blocked when any batch item is blocked; otherwise use open_payables when valid unpaid AP reimbursement bills remain; otherwise ready_to_close.

reviewed_claim_count.description: Number of claim IDs reviewed in the requested batch.
